body_txt: Not the same as Fake Nationality at all, this is when someone briefly imitates another character's accent (and possibly their Catchphrase ), usually for comedic effect. See also Just a Stupid Accent and Ooh, Me Accent's Slipping . If done unintentionally, the person being imitated will invoke Got Me Doing It . Might be a Shifting Voice of Madness for certain kinds of insane characters.
